characters.name: Sanford Reilly
characters.description: Sanford ReillyPersonalGenderMaleRelativesCindy Reilly, unnamed mother, unnamed father, unnamed uncle, unnamed grandfather.ResidencyDorm hall 3South, underclassman.FriendsDel Swanson, Ed Bickle, Coney.EnemiesJoe Tate(one sided), Randy Shaner, FelicityAdditionalPortrayed byBrian Dunkleman  Sanford Reillyis a "loud obnoxious jackass" who is the main character alongside his best friend,Del Swanson. Sanford is a loud, stupid, buffoon. Most of the people that know him do not enjoy his presence, he lacks social awareness and has a very active imagination. He has a negative influence around him and often shares poor advice or pointless statements that often come off as childish and immature.
